description: Public deterministic Phase 1 positions for exercising move legality and replay plumbing.

positions.expectedLegalMoveBehavior: Twenty legal opening moves are available; ordinary pawn and knight movement must work.
White starts in check and must capture the checking rook or move the king to a non-attacked square.
Both white castling moves are initially legal; later castling must still obey occupancy, attack, and rights rules.
White may play e5d6 en passant; the captured pawn must be removed and king safety re-evaluated.
White has four legal a7a8 promotion choices and every promotion output must include a lowercase UCI suffix.
The white rook may move along the e-file but may not expose its king by moving off that file.
